assignments.description: Assigns the Selected Budget for the ReadOnly path of the flow. This will be displayed in the following screen in a readonly format.
assignments.name: Assign_Selected_ReadOnly
assignments.label: Assign Selected ReadOnly

decisions.description: Checks the status of the Application to display a ReadOnly version when application is ReadOnly
decisions.name: Check_Application_Status
decisions.label: Check Application Status

Flow.description: NN 8/14/24 - added decision to fix issues with empty get CC 1/25/24 - adjusting table column widths | SB - Update Budget Name CA 07/30/25 - adding new budget Other columns CC 11/7/25 - Updated with a ReadOnly flow path
Flow.label: CDA - Budget Information [Screen Flow]

fields.name: Please_explain_in_kind_income_and_expenses_and_how_calculated
fields.fieldText: Please explain in-kind income and expenses and how calculated:

fields.name: dt_TotalCalculate
fields.fieldText: TOTAL REVENUE, TOTAL EXPENSES and EXCESS REVENUE (LOSS) OVER EXPENSES will be calculated upon save.

fields.name: Other_Apprentice_Wages_Taxes_and_Benefits_Revenue_ReadOnly
fields.fieldText: Other: Apprentice Wages, Taxes and Benefits

fields.name: Other_Apprentice_Wages_Taxes_and_Benefits_Expense_ReadOnly
fields.fieldText: Other: Apprentice Wages, Taxes and Benefits

fields.name: Please_explain_in_kind_income_and_expenses_and_how_calculate_ReadOnly
fields.fieldText: Please explain in-kind income and expenses and how calculated:

fields.name: dt_BudgetHome
fields.fieldText:
Annual Operating Budgets


(Inclusive of all programs operated by your agency)﻿

fields.name: dt_BudgetHome_ReadOnly
fields.fieldText:
Annual Operating Budgets


(Inclusive of all programs operated by your agency)﻿

fields.fieldText: Other: Apprentice Wages, Taxes and Benefits

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Please_explain_in_kind_income_and_expenses_and_how_calculated
fields.fieldText: Please explain in-kind income and expenses and how calculated:

fields.name: dt_TotalCaclulate
fields.fieldText: TOTAL REVENUE, TOTAL EXPENSES and EXCESS REVENUE (LOSS) OVER EXPENSES will be calculated upon save.
